name: 每日运势
description: 每日运势模块，支持查询今日运势、指定日期运势、农历日期转换，基于日期和姓名生成个性化运势结果，含七个运势等级和丰富的运势词库
description_en: Daily fortune module with personalized fortune by date and name, lunar calendar conversion, seven fortune levels and rich fortune vocabulary

apis.name: getDailyFortune
apis.desc: 获取今日运势，可传入姓名生成个性化结果，返回运势等级、运势词、幸运数字、幸运颜色、宜忌建议和农历日期
apis.desc_en: Get today's fortune. Pass a name for personalized result. Returns fortune level, keyword, lucky number, lucky color, advice and lunar date
paramDesc: 姓名（可选，用于个性化运势）

apis.name: getFortuneByDate
apis.desc: 获取指定日期的运势，返回运势等级、运势词、幸运数字、幸运颜色、宜忌建议和农历日期
apis.desc_en: Get fortune for a specific date. Returns fortune level, keyword, lucky number, lucky color, advice and lunar date

apis.name: getLunarDate
apis.desc: 将公历日期转换为农历日期，返回农历年月日、天干地支、生肖
apis.desc_en: Convert solar date to lunar date. Returns lunar year/month/day, heavenly stems and earthly branches, zodiac animal
paramDesc: 公历日期，格式 YYYY-MM-DD，不传则返回今天
paramDesc_en: Solar date in YYYY-MM-DD format, defaults to today

apis.name: getFortuneLevel
apis.desc: 查询运势等级详情，等级 1-7 分别对应大吉、吉、中吉、小吉、末吉、凶、大凶
apis.desc_en: Get fortune level details. Level 1-7: Excellent, Good, Fair, Moderate, Slight, Poor, Terrible
